00027 #ifndef JELATINE_METHOD_H
00028 #   define JELATINE_METHOD_H (1)
00029 
00030 #include "wrappers.h"
00031 
00032 #include "constantpool.h"
00033 #include "util.h"
00034 
00035 // Forward declarations
00036 
00037 struct class_t;
00038 
00039 /******************************************************************************
00040  * Method type declarations                                                   *
00041  ******************************************************************************/
00042 
00045 #define METHOD_ARGUMENTS_BITS (4)
00046 
00048 #define METHOD_ARGUMENTS_MAX (1 << METHOD_ARGUMENTS_BITS)
00049 
00051 #define METHOD_ARGUMENTS_MASK (METHOD_ARGUMENTS_MAX - 1)
00052 
00055 #define METHOD_INDEX_BITS (12)
00056 
00058 #define METHOD_INDEX_MAX (1 << METHOD_INDEX_BITS)
00059 
00062 #define METHOD_INDEX_SHIFT (METHOD_ARGUMENTS_BITS)
00063 
00067 enum return_value_t {
00068     RET_VOID   = 0, 
00069     RET_INT    = 1, 
00070     RET_LONG   = 2, 
00071     RET_OBJECT = 3, 
00072     RET_FLOAT  = 4, 
00073     RET_DOUBLE = 5  
00074 };
00075 
00077 typedef enum return_value_t return_value_t;
00078 
00081 struct exception_handler_t {
00082     uint32_t start_pc; 
00083     uint32_t end_pc; 
00084     uint8_t *handler_pc; 
00085     struct class_t *catch_type; 
00086 };
00087 
00089 typedef struct exception_handler_t exception_handler_t;
00090 
00092 typedef void (*native_proto_t)( void );
00093 
00096 struct method_t {
00097     const char *name; 
00098     const char *descriptor; 
00099     const_pool_t *cp; 
00100     uint16_t access_flags; 
00101     uint16_t args_size; 
00102     uint16_t index; 
00103     uint16_t max_stack; 
00104     uint16_t max_locals; 
00105     uint16_t return_type; 
00106     uint16_t code_length; 
00107     uint16_t exception_table_length; 
00108     uint8_t *code; 
00109 
00110     union {
00111         exception_handler_t *handlers; 
00112         long offset; 
00113         native_proto_t function; 
00114     } data; 
00115 };
00116 
00118 typedef struct method_t method_t;
00119 
00122 struct method_manager_t {
00123 #ifndef NDEBUG
00124     uint32_t reserved; 
00125 #endif // !NDEBUG
00126     uint32_t entries; 
00127     method_t *methods; 
00128 };
00129 
00131 typedef struct method_manager_t method_manager_t;
00132 
00133 /******************************************************************************
00134  * Global variables                                                           *
00135  ******************************************************************************/
00136 
00145 extern method_t halt_method;
00146 
00147 /******************************************************************************
00148  * Function prototypes                                                        *
00149  ******************************************************************************/
00150 
00151 extern method_manager_t *mm_create(uint32_t);
00152 extern method_t *mm_get(method_manager_t *, char *, char *);
00153 extern uint32_t mm_get_count(method_manager_t *);
00154 extern void mm_add(method_manager_t *, char *, char *, uint16_t,
00155                    const_pool_t *, method_attributes_t *);
00156 
00157 extern void init_dummy_methods( void );
00158 
00159 extern bool method_compare(const method_t *, const method_t *);
00160 extern void method_link_native(method_t *, char *);
00161 extern void method_purge(method_t *);
00162 extern uint32_t method_get_code_length(const method_t *);
00163 extern bool method_is_init(const method_t *);
00164 extern uint16_t method_create_packed_index(const method_t *);
00165 
00171 static inline uint16_t method_unpack_arguments(uint16_t m)
00172 {
00173     return m & METHOD_ARGUMENTS_MASK;
00174 } // method_unpack_arguments()
00175 
00180 static inline uint16_t method_unpack_index(uint16_t m)
00181 {
00182     return m >> METHOD_INDEX_SHIFT;
00183 } // method_unpack_index()
00184 
00189 static inline bool method_is_public(const method_t *m)
00190 {
00191     return m->access_flags & ACC_PUBLIC;
00192 } // method_is_public()
00193 
00198 static inline bool method_is_protected(const method_t *m)
00199 {
00200     return m->access_flags & ACC_PROTECTED;
00201 } // method_is_protected()
00202 
00207 static inline bool method_is_private(const method_t *m)
00208 {
00209     return m->access_flags & ACC_PRIVATE;
00210 } // method_is_private()
00211 
00216 static inline bool method_is_native(const method_t *m)
00217 {
00218     return m->access_flags & ACC_NATIVE;
00219 } // method_is_native()
00220 
00225 static inline bool method_is_static(const method_t *m)
00226 {
00227     return m->access_flags & ACC_STATIC;
00228 } // method_is_static()
00229 
00234 static inline bool method_is_final(const method_t *m)
00235 {
00236     return m->access_flags & ACC_FINAL;
00237 } // method_is_final()
00238 
00243 static inline bool method_is_synchronized(const method_t *m)
00244 {
00245     return m->access_flags & ACC_SYNCHRONIZED;
00246 } // method_is_synchronized()
00247 
00252 static inline bool method_is_abstract(const method_t *m)
00253 {
00254     return m->access_flags & ACC_ABSTRACT;
00255 } // method_is_abstract()
00256 
00260 static inline void method_set_linked(method_t *m)
00261 {
00262     m->access_flags |= ACC_LINKED;
00263 } // method_set_linked()
00264 
00269 static inline bool method_is_linked(const method_t *m)
00270 {
00271     return m->access_flags & ACC_LINKED;
00272 } // method_is_linked()
00273 
00278 static inline bool method_is_main(const method_t *m)
00279 {
00280     return m->access_flags & ACC_MAIN;
00281 } // method_is_main()
00282 
00287 static inline void method_set_index(method_t *method, uint16_t index)
00288 {
00289     method->index = index;
00290 } // method_set_index()
00291 
00295 static inline uint16_t method_get_index(const method_t *method)
00296 {
00297     return method->index;
00298 } // method_get_index()
00299 
00300 /******************************************************************************
00301  * Method iterator                                                            *
00302  ******************************************************************************/
00303 
00306 struct method_iterator_t {
00307     method_t *methods; 
00308     size_t entries; 
00309     size_t index; 
00310 };
00311 
00313 typedef struct method_iterator_t method_iterator_t;
00314 
00319 static inline method_iterator_t method_itr(method_manager_t *mm)
00320 {
00321     method_iterator_t itr;
00322 
00323     itr.methods = mm->methods;
00324     itr.entries = mm->entries;
00325     itr.index = 0;
00326 
00327     return itr;
00328 } // method_itr()
00329 
00334 static inline bool method_itr_has_next(method_iterator_t itr)
00335 {
00336     return itr.index < itr.entries;
00337 } // method_itr_has_next()
00338 
00344 static inline method_t *method_itr_get_next(method_iterator_t *itr)
00345 {
00346     assert(method_itr_has_next(*itr));
00347 
00348     return itr->methods + itr->index++;
00349 } // method_itr_get_next()
00350 
00351 #endif // JELATINE_METHOD_H
Generated on Mon Mar 14 2016 15:38:45 for @PACKAGE_NAME@ by  1.7.1
